ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., eBook, print, video) */,
  "cover_image" TEXT /* File path to the cover image of the resource */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the resource */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of views or hits the resource has received */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was published */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the resource */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the resource */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the author */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the author's profile picture */,
  "website" TEXT /* Author's website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_authors" (
  "resource_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource-author pair */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author's contribution (e.g., primary author, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_authors_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "parent_subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent subject (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_subjects" (
  "resource_subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource-subject pair */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_subjects_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_subjects_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_levels" (
  "grade_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade level */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade level */,
  "grade_range" TEXT /* Specific grade range (e.g., 3-5, 6-8) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_grade_levels" (
  "resource_grade_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource-grade level pair */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "grade_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_grade_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_grade_levels_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_grade_levels_grade_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_level_id") REFERENCES grade_levels ("grade_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., PDF, MP4, JPEG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the collection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the collection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_resources" (
  "collection_resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection-resource pair */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the resource was added to the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_resources_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_resources_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, educator, student) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., create, read, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_access_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the resource file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, MP4, JPEG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_files_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_tags_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_collections" (
  "user_collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-collection pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date the user joined the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_collections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_collections_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_comments_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_ratings_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-collection pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Date the user followed the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_followers_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)
